findings.location: s5 (index title: "ヘッダーレコードの精査処理")
findings.description: Section s5 is titled "ヘッダーレコードの精査処理" (an h3 in the source), but its content begins with the h2-level "ファイルバリデータ実装" material — specifically the RecordTypeBindingハンドラ explanation, the full record-type-to-method-name table, and the `do`+recordtype method naming convention footnote. This parent h2 content applies to all record types (header, data, trailer, end), not just header records. As a result, the section title misrepresents the scope of the content it contains.
findings.source_evidence: Source h2 section "ファイルバリデータ実装" contains the RecordTypeBinding table and method-name convention, followed by h3 subsections ヘッダーレコードの精査処理, データレコードの精査処理, トレーラレコードの精査処理. The knowledge file merges the h2-level content into s5 (titled after the first h3 only).
